reason: The image depicts a large gathering of people, mostly women wearing cloche hats and kneeling in a muddy field. This corresponds well with descriptions of the crowd assembled at Fatima in 1917. The clothing style and the presence of a newspaper further reinforce the period. The lack of any obvious modern technology or fantastical elements supports its authenticity. There is nothing I can see to directly invalidate the photograph, making it believable for the 'Miracle of the Sun' event.
